name: Chocolate Cherry Pie Fhmn87a
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the dry ingredients (flour and cornstarch), add the milk and chocolate, and bring to a boil.
2. Lower the heat and cook, stirring constantly until thickened.
3. Lightly beat the egg yolks and add them slowly to the custard, stirring over low heat for 2 to 3 minutes.
4. Add the vanilla, rum, and butter, then cool to room temperature.
5. Whip half of the cream and fold it into the pudding mixture with the cherries (cut into quarters).
6. Serve topped with the remaining cream whipped with powdered sugar and garnish with grated chocolate.
